initiatives.initiative_title: Export Module: Multi-Format Data Output and Schema Validation

tasks.task_title: Assess and design: Export Module: Multi-Format Data Output and Schema Validation

issues_found: No identified risks - missing risk assessment for CSV escaping edge cases, nested JSON handling, YAML type inference complexity, and schema validation performance implications
No acceptance criteria - lacking explicit success metrics such as data volume performance targets, error message actionability requirements, and format compatibility coverage expectations
Task dependencies unclear - no specification of task sequence or whether Output Schema Validation must be completed before exporters or in parallel
Missing complexity/effort estimation - tasks lack point values, estimated duration, or complexity levels needed for decomposition planning

initiatives.initiative_title: Integration & CLI: End-to-End Orchestration and User Interface

tasks.task_title: Assess and design: Integration & CLI: End-to-End Orchestration and User Interface

issues_found: No identified risks or technical challenges (integration complexity, error propagation across boundaries, performance considerations, UX design decisions)
No acceptance criteria or success metrics defined (test coverage %, performance benchmarks, user workflow coverage, documentation requirements)

Task definitions lack specificity and remain decomposable (CLI design could split into design/basic/advanced, error handling is a design task not implementation, test suite needs scenario count and coverage targets)
Missing task dependencies and execution sequence (no clarity on which tasks must complete before others)
Design decisions deferred (configuration format choice, CLI UX pattern, error message strategy, API contracts between modules)
Missing cross-cutting requirements (backwards compatibility, documentation/user guide, performance targets, module API contracts)
Scope ambiguity ("comprehensive" error handling undefined, "proper" error propagation undefined, "common workflows" undefined)
